debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
σ₂ t₀ T x : ℝ
K : ℕ
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioc (5 / 8) 1
ht₀ : t₀ = max (FKS.Hσ (FKS.Inputs.H₀ I) (FKS.Inputs.R I) σ₂) (exp (√(log x) / FKS.Inputs.R I))
hT : T > t₀
ZDB : zero_density_bound
⊢ FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ FKS.ε₄ I t₀ x σ₂ K T

failed_attempts:
have hK : (K : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by sorry
  let t : Fin (K + 2) → ℝ := fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ ((k : ℝ) / K)
  have h_mono : StrictMono t := by
    intro i j h
    dsimp [t]
    gcongr
    · exact hT
    · rw [div_lt_div_right (by sorry)]
      exact Nat.cast_lt.mpr h
  let t' : Fin (K + 1) → ℝ := fun k ↦ t k.castSucc
  have htK' : t' (Fin.last K) = T := by
    simp [t', t]
    rw [div_self hK, Real.rpow_one]
  have ht0' : t' 0 = max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂) (exp (sqrt (log x) / I.R)) := by
    simp [t', t, ht₀]
  rcases proposition_3_11 I (K - 1) hσ₂ t' ht0' htK' (fun i j h ↦ h_mono (Fin.castSucc_lt_castSucc_iff.mpr h)) with ⟨_, h_bound⟩
  apply le_trans h_bound
  sorry
